title: nObUfFoNlYSwIM
description: Simple Mod that lets mounted Horses swim through water without sinking and throwing the player off. Based on HorseBuff for fabric by F53.
body: Simple Mod that lets mounted Horses swim through water without sinking and throwing the player off. Based on [Horse Buff](https://modrinth.com/mod/horsebuff) for fabric by [F53](https://modrinth.com/user/F53).
